revision.comment: add {{[[Template:CatAutoTOC|CatAutoTOC]]}}, which will generate a table of contents (TOC) if the category has enough pages to need one
1 revision imported: importing wikipedia
fixing the uncategorized categories error
Adding [[Category:kk]][[category:kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:making categorization show up on newly imported categories and templates]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:1 revision imported]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:1 revision imported]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "qq" to "11"
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (1 members)
Bot: tag as Tier 0 category
Bot: confirm enwiki category & retag
Bot: append metadata & Tier-2 tag
Text replacement - "Tier 2 Categories" to "Tier 1 Categories"
Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "
revision.text: {{Navseasoncats}} {{Portal|Religion}} {{CatAutoTOC}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Uncategorized categories]] [[Category:8th-century Buddhists|Monks]] [[Category:8th-century monks|Buddhist]] [[Category:Buddhist monks by century]] }} [[sn:8th-century Buddhist monks]] [[Category:Categories with 1 members]] [[en:Category:8th-century Buddhist monks]] [[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[ja:Category:8世紀の僧]] [[ar:Category:رهبان بوذيون في القرن 8]] [[bn:Category:৮ম শতাব্দীর বৌদ্ধ ভিক্ষু]] [[commons:Category:8th-century Buddhist monks]] [[es:Category:Monjes budistas del siglo VIII]] [[fr:Category:Moine bouddhique du VIIIe siècle]] [[ur:Category:آٹھویں صدی کے بھکشو]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]]" to "[[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[category:confirmed enwiki categories]]"

revision.comment: Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
revision.text:

{{translated page|ja|Category:8世紀の僧]]|version=74076903}} [[ja:Category:8世紀の僧]]

Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q65627633)
Bot: remove [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] (has wikidata link)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "[[commons:" to "[[co:commons:"
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
